deferred_findings.note: BC-4.12.005 PC4 vs ADR-018 collision-order contradiction (first-declared-wins vs last-write-wins). PC6 makes scenario unreachable but BC↔ADR drift remains.
BC-4.12.003 PC2 vs BC-4.12.004 PC2 duplicate event naming (resolver.capability_denied vs resolver.error with error_kind=capability_denied). Requires PO adjudication.
Section does not cover concurrency model for resolver invocation (BC-4.12.001 EC-003 inherits from plugin_loader pattern but section is silent).

BC-4.12.003 PC4 host log triplet vs HOST_ABI host-functions section single log(level, ...) API. Documented as SDK wrapper convention in pass-2 fix, but the underlying BC text still describes 3 functions. Wave-gate to adjudicate whether BC should be amended.

BC-4.12.001 INV3 (same Engine instance for resolvers and hooks) + PC4 (determinism) not surfaced in HOST_ABI section. Dispatcher-impl territory; relevant for S-12.04. Author should read BC-4.12.001 directly. Pass-4 candidate BC-4.12.001 PC5 (startup log 'Compiled N resolver modules') demoted symmetrically into this entry — same dispatcher-internal observability category per pass-3 classification rule.
